location: Purchased (no combat required) from the Nomadic Merchant camped at the Castle Morne Rampart Site of Grace on the eastern side of Weeping Peninsula, for 3,000 runes.
tactics: Simply rest at Castle Morne Rampart grace and buy it from the Nomadic Merchant's stock — no fighting needed.
Available from the very start of the game, making it one of the earliest solid Strength/Dex greatswords.
Don't confuse this merchant camp outside Castle Morne with the Claymore, which sits in a chest further inside the castle itself.
lore: A broad, straight-bladed sword normally wielded two-handed, though a strong enough warrior can swing it one-handed. Its wide blade is suited to sweeping strikes that can cut through several foes at once.

builds.name: Early-Game Quality Starter
builds.why: Cheap, available immediately, and carries balanced D-rank Strength/Dexterity scaling that fits almost any early build.

builds.name: Ash of War Carrier
builds.why: A generic, respectable-damage greatsword moveset makes it a flexible early host for a preferred Ash of War before a signature weapon is found.
